invariants.rule: Never trust organizationId or tenant ids from client input alone
Sensitive mutations must call writeAuditLog or writeAuditLogMany
requirements: Pass tx inside $transaction so audit rolls back with business data
Append-only AuditLog — no updates or deletes

invariants.rule: web-vite tRPC/React Query only in domain hooks, never pages or containers
Large domains split into sub-routers composed with mergeRouters

examples.payment: payment-core + payment-export + payment-run-ops + payment-import + payment-skonto → payment.ts
examples.portal: portal-auth + portal-invoices + portal-contracts + portal-profile + portal-equipment + portal-tax-form → portal.ts

invariants.rationale: Flat namespace for clients; smaller files; shared helpers in *-shared.ts

invariants.rule: Portal procedures live in portalAppRouter, not appRouter
invariants.rationale: Smaller AppRouter type for dashboard client TS inference

invariants.rule: Every tRPC procedure has Zod input; external payloads use safeParse not bare as
Apps use @contractor-ops/feature-flags only; never Unleash SDK directly

us_expansion_gate.portal_note: portal tax-form procedures are in the flat merged portalRouter and cannot be conditionally spread — each procedure calls assertUsExpansionEnabled directly

invariants.rule: Payment run creation blocked when compliance items fail eligibility
Invoice must be MATCHED or MANUALLY_CONFIRMED before submitForApproval
Structured logging via @contractor-ops/logger (Pino); no console.* in app source
New env vars require .env.example + package env.ts schema
minimumReleaseAge 7 days on pnpm; no @latest bypass without approval
WithholdingTaxRate is extended additively; US treaty rows add sourceCountry='US' + treatyArticle column alongside existing SA rows
invariants.rationale: calculateWht (SA WHT) is never touched; applyTreaty uses the same table scoped to sourceCountry='US' + serviceType='business_profits'; backward-compatible additive column

invariants.rule: TaxFormSubmission is immutable once ACTIVE — re-certification inserts a new ACTIVE row and flips prior to SUPERSEDED; no in-place edits
invariants.rationale: ESIGN-Act compliance; the snapshot JSON is the legal record-of-record; append-only preserves the certification trail

invariants.rule: Portal procedures derive contractorId from the validated session (ctx.contractorId), never from client-supplied input
invariants.example: packages/api/src/routers/portal/portal-tax-form-router.ts — all queries/mutations scope to ctx.contractorId + ctx.organizationId
invariants.rationale: Prevents IDOR: a contractor cannot forge another contractor's form submission or read

invariants.rule: TaxFormSubmission.snapshotJson never holds a full SSN — only last-4 reference; buildFormSnapshot sanitizes all forbidden key names
invariants.rationale: Full SSN lives in the contractor's dedicated encrypted column behind contractorPii:read; keeping it out of the snapshot avoids log-PII exposure
